title: Spiritmancy
description: Harness souls for crafting and spells
body:
A mod about harnessing souls for crafting and spells, To get started, craft the Spiritus Libri, The Spiritus Libri will guide you through the mod, The mod is somewhat small currently

Some of the features this mod includes are :

Soulcasting - Creating a spell on a wand using a soulcaster's table and casting it at the cost of souls

Soul Harvesting - Harvesting souls from enemies killed using special weapons

Soul Studying - Studying souls to gain knowledge or even ancient knowledge

A Boss Fight :
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Soul Keeper

Spawned by finishing the soul ritual
![The Soul Keeper Spawning](https://file.garden/ZSPuqNWX7CO9FTyY/2023-12-26_10.36.12.png)
When you are fighting it, a circle will appear around it, If all players leave the circle then the soul keeper will despawn

The soul keeper has 2 phases, It will reach the second phase after reaching 0 health for the first time

**Phase 1 :**

Attack 1 - Summons 2 Skeletons and 2 Zombies both with fire resistance

Attack 2 - Teleports to the player and creates a Soul Explosion dealing 20 damage to everything around it

**Phase 2 :**

Attack 3 - Creates a Soul Explosion at the location of every mob in the arena with a max health of less than 30, killing the mobs and dealing 20 damage to everything around it

Attack 4 - Teleports to a random mob in the arena and kills it to gain the mobs health
</details>
